home.welcomeIntro: Pick your board and an image. We'll download it, write it to your SD card or USB drive, and verify it for you.
home.offlineHint: Flash from a local file or an image you downloaded earlier.

flash.systemDeviceWarning: Flashing this can destroy the running OS.
flash.confirmText: Take one last look before writing.
flash.confirmWarning: ALL DATA WILL BE PERMANENTLY ERASED
flash.dataWarning: All data on the selected device will be erased
flash.successHint: Your SD card is ready! You can safely remove it and insert it into your {{boardName}}.
flash.successHintCustom: Your SD card is ready! You can safely remove it.
flash.successHintQdl: Flash complete! The device is ready to boot.
flash.noShaMessage: This image has no SHA checksum, so the written data can't be verified. Flashing will continue anyway.

modal.boardUpdateRequiredHint: This board isn't supported by this version of Forge Imager. Please update.
modal.insertDevice: Insert an SD card or USB drive
modal.rollingBuildMessage: Rolling-release images are built automatically from the latest code. They can contain untested changes and bugs, so they may not boot or work correctly.
modal.communityBoardMessage: This board is maintained by the community, so its images may not boot or work correctly and support is limited. Use the official builds when you can.

device.qdlNotFound: No EDL device found. Put your board in EDL mode and connect via USB.
device.qdlInstructions: Place the jumper on the JCTL pins, then connect the USB-C cable.
device.qdlInstructionsButton: Hold the EDL button while powering on, then connect the USB cable.

errorDisplay.scanQrOrShare: Scan the QR code or share this link:

error.writeFailed: Writing to the device failed at {{offset}}. The device may be too small, failing, or the reader was disconnected. Try another card, reader, or port.
error.qdlDisconnected: Device disconnected during flash. Reconnect in EDL mode and retry.
error.qdlPermissionDenied: USB access denied. On Linux, install udev rules: echo 'SUBSYSTEM=="usb", ATTR{idVendor}=="05c6", ATTR{idProduct}=="9008", MODE="0666"' | sudo tee /etc/udev/rules.d/51-qdl.rules && echo 'blacklist qcserial' | sudo tee /etc/modprobe.d/blacklist-qcserial.conf && sudo udevadm control --reload-rules
error.qdlConnectionFailed: Couldn't connect to the EDL device. Make sure it's in EDL mode and connected via USB.
error.qdlAutoconfigFailed: Failed to apply the autoconfig profile to the QDL image.

Forge.description: This device is running Forge. Want to pre-select this board and skip the manual steps?
Forge.cancelHint: If you cancel, board auto-detection turns off.
Forge.disabledToast: Board auto-detection disabled. Re-enable it in Settings.

settings.title: Settings
settings.appDescription: Writes OS images to SD cards and USB drives
settings.developerModeDescription: Enable verbose logging and debug info
settings.skipVerifyDescription: Skip verifying written data after flashing (faster but less safe)
settings.forceOfflineDescription: Always work offline: skip the connectivity check and use only local and cached images.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.showUpdaterModalDescription: Notify you when an update is available
notifications.showWelcomeDescription: Show the welcome screen when the app starts

cache.title: Cache settings
cache.enableDescription: Keep downloaded images so a retry is faster if flashing fails
cache.maxSizeDescription: Removes the oldest images automatically once the size limit is reached
cache.clearDescription: Remove all cached data to free up space
cache.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all cached data? This cannot be undone.
cache.manageDescription: View, delete, or reuse cached images
cache.deleteConfirmAll: Delete all {{count}} cached images for this board?

settings.allowSystemDevicesDescription: Risky: you can overwrite the running OS.

Forge.title: Forge
Forge.label: Auto-detect board
Forge.description: Identify the board automatically when this device runs Forge

toast.allowSystemDevicesError: Failed to update system drives setting
toast.welcomeError: Failed to update welcome screen setting

autoconfig.title: Autoconfig profiles
autoconfig.description: Preset the first-boot setup. A profile is applied only when you select it before flashing.
autoconfig.emptyHint: Create a profile to preset network, locale and accounts on first boot.
autoconfig.localeRequiresUser: Locale and timezone only apply when you create a user, so fill in the username, password and full name first.
autoconfig.keyUrlInvalid: Enter a URL to the public key (e.g. https://github.com/username.keys), not the key itself
autoconfig.urlInvalid: Enter a valid URL (http or https)
autoconfig.secretWarning: Passwords are stored and written to the image in plain text.
autoconfig.userHint: Leave the username empty and the OS will still ask you to create a user on first boot.
autoconfig.previewEmpty: Nothing set yet. Fill in the fields above to build the first-boot file.

update.title: Update Available
update.readyMessage: The update is downloaded. Restart the app to finish installing.
update.errorMessage: Failed to download the update. Please try again later.
update.errorNotInApplications: Please move the app to the Applications folder and try again.
update.changelogErrorHint: Check that you're online and that the version exists on GitHub.
